question: Find miRNAs that are associated with diseases that disrupt biological processes.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease)-[:disease_causes_disruption_of]->(bp:Biological_process), (m:miRNA)<-[:function_of]-(bp) RETURN m, d, bp

question: Find miRNAs that are part of biological processes that result in morphogenesis of cellular components.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:results_in_morphogenesis_of]->(cc:Cellular_component), (bp)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN m, bp, cc

question: Find miRNAs involved in biological processes that negatively regulate cell proliferation.
cypher: MATCH (bp:Biological_process)-[:negatively_regulates]->(go:GO), (bp)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) WHERE go.Label CONTAINS 'cell proliferation' RETURN m, bp, go

question: Find miRNAs that are part of GO terms that participate in autoimmune diseases.
cypher: MATCH (ad:Autoimmune_disease)-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(go:GO), (go)-[:has_participant]->(m:miRNA) RETURN m, go, ad

question: Return diseases that do not have any associated phenotype.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE NOT (d)-[:has_phenotype]->(:Phenotype) RETURN d

question: Find miRNAs that have no known function annotated.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE NOT (m)-[:function_of]->(:GO) RETURN m

question: Return all molecular functions that lack a subclass relationship.
cypher: MATCH (mf:Molecular_function) WHERE NOT (mf)-[:subclassof]->(:Molecular_function) RETURN mf

question: Find phenotypes that do not have a quality specified.
cypher: MATCH (p:Phenotype) WHERE NOT (p)-[:has_quality]->(:Phenotype) RETURN p

question: Return all autoimmune diseases without any associated phenotype.
cypher: MATCH (a:Autoimmune_disease) WHERE NOT (a)-[:has_phenotype]->(:Phenotype) RETURN a

question: Find cellular components that are not part of any other cellular component.
cypher: MATCH (c:Cellular_component) WHERE NOT (c)-[:part_of]->(:Cellular_component) RETURN c

question: Return all GO terms without any 'part_of' relationships.
cypher: MATCH (g:GO) WHERE NOT (g)-[:part_of]->(:GO) RETURN g

question: Find diseases that have no causal agents in GO terms.
cypher: MATCH (d:Disease) WHERE NOT EXISTS { MATCH (d)-[:disease_caused_by_disruption_of]->(:GO) } RETURN d

question: Return miRNAs that do not have a location specified.
cypher: MATCH (m:miRNA) WHERE NOT (m)-[:location_of]->(:Cellular_component) RETURN m
